title: goodenia xanthosperma
intro: Goodenia xanthosperma, also known as Yellow Bells, is a perennial herb native to Australia, belonging to the family Goodeniaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Goodenia xanthosperma include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Goodenia xanthosperma can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health problems.
